exam_name: Google Advanced Data Analytics Professional Certificate
id_requirements: Coursera account; Google certificate credential shared via Credly badge upon completion
exam_rules: No single timed proctored exam. Assessment is embedded across courses: multiple-choice quizzes (≥80% to pass), hands-on labs, peer-reviewed projects, and a capstone project. Learners can retry quizzes up to 3 times per attempt.
renewal_options: Certificates do not expire; no formal renewal required. Google recommends keeping skills current through continued learning.

prerequisites.description: Google Data Analytics Certificate or equivalent experience; basic Python and statistics knowledge helpful

retake_policy.notes: Quizzes can be retaken; no limit on course re-enrolment; learners progress at their own pace

domains.name: Foundations of Data Science (data science workflow, Python, Jupyter Notebooks)
Get Started with Python (data structures, functions, OOP, NumPy, pandas)
Go Beyond the Numbers: Data Storytelling (exploratory data analysis, visualisation)
Statistics for Data Science (probability, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals)
Regression Analysis (linear, logistic, variable selection, model evaluation)
Machine Learning (supervised/unsupervised learning, decision trees, clustering, XGBoost)
Capstone Project: End-to-end data science project

official_study_resources.title: Google Career Certificates — Practice Quizzes (embedded in courses)
Google Career Certificates — Course Readings and Labs

aliases: google advanced data analytics professional certificate
